package main

import (
	"context"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/liguangsheng/goost/zapctx"
	"github.com/liguangsheng/goost/zapctx/zapctxgin"
	"go.uber.org/zap"
)

func main() {
	engine := gin.New()
	engine.Use(zapctxgin.Middleware(zap.NewNop()))
	engine.Use(zapctxgin.PayloadMiddleware(zap.NewNop(), zapctxgin.WithMaxBody(1024)))
	zapctx.L(context.Background()).Info("handled")
}
